title: [FEATURE] Email mailbox management: list, move, mark-read/spam

title: Draft-only mode for human accounts + can_send config flag
description: Human accounts (cognovis, private) should operate in draft-only mode: create JMAP draft, then open Mail.app for review. Only agent accounts (shikigami) with jmap:submission scope send directly. Add can_send boolean per account in config.toml to control behavior without trial-and-error 403s.
close_reason: All features implemented and merged, 147 tests passing

close_reason: pyproject.toml + src/fmcli/ + tests/ scaffold, uv sync --dev + pytest --no-cov clean (jmapc pinned to >=0.2.0, latest is 0.2.23)

title: Cross-Account Abfrage (--all-accounts)

close_reason: All features implemented and merged, 147 tests passing

title: calendar list: --today Flag (bis Mitternacht)
description: calendar list --days 1 zeigt nächste 24h ab jetzt. Braucht --today Flag das nur Events bis Mitternacht des heutigen Tages zeigt. Use Case: 'Welche Termine habe ich noch heute?'
close_reason: All features implemented and merged, 147 tests passing

title: email list: --mailbox filter (inbox, sent, etc.)
description: email list zeigt aktuell alle Mails über alle Mailboxen. Braucht --mailbox/--folder Flag um auf eine bestimmte Mailbox zu filtern (z.B. inbox, sent, drafts, spam). JMAP: inMailbox-Filter im EmailQuery. Use Case: 'Welche E-Mails habe ich in meiner Inbox?'

title: Orthogonal email list filters: --mailbox, --unread, --all-accounts
description: Email listing should support three independent, combinable filters: (1) --mailbox for folder filtering (inbox/spam/archive), (2) --unread for unseen/unread status, (3) --all-accounts for aggregating across accounts. Each filter is orthogonal — any combination should work.
close_reason: Meta-bead, decomposed into fmcli-al4 (--mailbox), fmcli-j10 (--unread), fmcli-7z9 (--all-accounts)

title: [SETUP] Multi-account config file handling

close_reason: Config.load() + AccountConfig dataclass, get_account() resolves by name/FMC_ACCOUNT env/default, 8 tests 97% coverage

title: [FEATURE] Files command: list, download, upload, delete
description: Using webdavclient3 for Fastmail Files. Commands: fmcli files list, fmcli files download <path>, upload, delete. TDD.
close_reason: list/download/upload/delete via webdavclient3, dir-itself filtering, 16 tests

title: [ADR] Use CardDAV for contacts, not JMAP
description: Decision: Fastmail JMAP supports contacts (urn:ietf:params:jmap:contacts / ContactCard/get) but the jmapc Python library does not implement it. Rebuilding CardDAV contacts→JMAP in Python is not worth the effort. Stick with CardDAV for contacts.
close_reason: ADR: jmapc lacks JMAP contacts support, CardDAV is proven and working — no migration needed

title: email list: --unread filter
description: Kein Filter für ungelesene Mails. Braucht --unread Flag das den JMAP hasKeyword/notKeyword Filter nutzt ($seen). Kombinierbar mit --mailbox. Use Case: 'Welche neuen E-Mails habe ich?'
close_reason: All features implemented and merged, 147 tests passing

title: email draft: create draft without sending + open in Mail.app
description: email send sollte standardmäßig nur einen Draft erstellen (kein EmailSubmissionSet), nicht senden. Der Draft wird in der Drafts-Mailbox angelegt. Danach soll fmcli die macOS Mail.app öffnen mit dem Draft zur Review. Ablauf: 1) EmailSet mit mailbox_ids={drafts} und keywords={$draft:true} — OHNE EmailSubmissionSet. 2) open -a Mail (oder AppleScript um direkt den Draft zu öffnen). Shikigami-Account hat weiterhin submission-Scope für automatisches Senden via Agents. Use Case: User sagt 'schreib eine Mail an Michael', Agent erstellt Draft, öffnet Mail.app, User reviewt und klickt Send.
notes: Config-Feld 'can_send = true/false' pro Account in config.toml. fmcli prüft das vor EmailSubmissionSet — wenn false, nur Draft erstellen + Mail.app öffnen. Vermeidet 403 bei Accounts ohne jmap:submission Scope.
close_reason: All features implemented and merged, 147 tests passing

title: calendar search: Rückwärts-Suche in vergangenen Terminen
description: calendar list zeigt nur zukünftige Termine. Braucht calendar search um vergangene Termine zu durchsuchen (z.B. nach Titel, Zeitraum). Use Case: 'Wann fand der Termin zur Installation der Klimaanlage statt?'
close_reason: All features implemented and merged, 147 tests passing

title: [EPIC] fmcli: Multi-account Fastmail CLI

title: Setup PyPI trusted publisher + release.yml workflow
description: Create .github/workflows/release.yml for PyPI trusted publishing. PyPI already configured: repo sussdorff/fmcli, workflow release.yml, environment (Any). Workflow should: trigger on tag push (v*), build with uv, publish to PyPI using trusted publisher (no API token needed). Reference: standard PyPI trusted publisher GitHub Actions pattern.
close_reason: All features implemented and merged, 147 tests passing
